description: Golden cases for medspaCy assertion tagging (worker/python/analyze_assertions.py). AU community mental health phrasing. Contract: expect.negated/uncertain/family/historical assert membership in the corresponding *_terms output; additionally EVERY target not listed in expect.negated (resp. expect.uncertain) must be absent from negated_terms (resp. uncertain_terms), so false-positive existence flags fail the gate. `expect.asserted` is documentation of intent — those terms are enforced by the universal false-positive rule. Family/historical are positive-only (contextual qualifiers may legitimately co-occur with asserted mentions).

cases.text: On review the patient denies suicidal ideation and denies any plan or intent.
No thoughts of self harm were reported during the assessment.
Nil auditory hallucinations at present.
She denies auditory hallucinations but describes ongoing paranoid ideation.
No chest pain, however the patient reports palpitations since starting clozapine.
The dose was increased without extrapyramidal side effects.
There were no signs of neuroleptic malignant syndrome on examination.
He denies current alcohol use and denies illicit substance use.
Weekly FBC shows no neutropenia and the absolute neutrophil count remains within range.
The consumer is not currently suicidal and was discharged with a safety plan.
Possible neuroleptic malignant syndrome; cease antipsychotic and transfer to the emergency department.
Impression: query serotonin syndrome given recent SSRI dose increase.
Suspected myocarditis in week three of clozapine titration.
Differential diagnosis includes drug induced psychosis versus first episode schizophrenia.
The restlessness may represent akathisia rather than agitation.
cases.note: 'rather than X' excludes X: agitation is correctly both negated (excluded) and uncertain (inside the tentative differential). Surfaced by the false-positive gate; encoded as intended behavior.

cases.text: If lithium toxicity develops, withhold the next dose and obtain an urgent level.
Family history of bipolar disorder in her mother.
Her father was diagnosed with schizophrenia in his twenties.
There is a family history of suicide on the paternal side.
Past history of deliberate self harm as an adolescent.
History of overdose in 2019 requiring ICU admission.
Previous episode of catatonia responded well to electroconvulsive therapy.
The patient reports auditory hallucinations commanding self harm.
Commenced on clozapine 12.5 mg with standard titration and weekly monitoring.
The ECG shows a prolonged QTc of 480 ms; repeat after dose reduction.
He expresses active suicidal ideation with a specific plan.
Seclusion was initiated at 2140 following a code black.
She remains on a community treatment order reviewed by the tribunal in March.
No evidence of serotonin syndrome, although tremor and hyperreflexia should prompt urgent review.
Family history of depression; the patient herself reports low mood and anhedonia.
